named_sequences_engine: Theatre.js · use sparingly only for authored sequences (branch creation pulse, release-gate pass)

sequences.trigger: click or arrow-nav on a lyric line
sequences.describe: Active line gets the inset 2px blue/faery bar + a soft horizontal wash from accent → transparent at 75% width.
side_effects: Inspector contents fade+slide-in (insp_reveal) with selected line/section context
Workbench takes filter to those whose section overlaps the selection (workbench_filter)

sequences.describe: Inspector panel content slides in 8px from right with opacity 0 → 1.
Take cards out of scope fade out and lift; in-scope cards pop in with a slight scale.

sequences.trigger: user taps like / keep / mutate / avoid on a lyric line or take
sequences.describe: A tiny ink dot stamps to the left of the line number. Stamp is a spring-overshoot. Marker stays forever.
sequences.persistence: marker is a render of TasteSignal in the DB · never disappears unless user removes the signal

sequences.trigger: Generation Desk submits a run · or fork from a node
sequences.describe: NOT a generic spinner. A path is drawn along the lineage edge from parent → new node, then the new node glows once.
Card drops 46px to the archive lane below, scales down to 0.92, desaturates, and switches to dashed border. No animation back; only restore-from-archive.

sequences.trigger: cursor enters a glass surface (chip, picker tile, generation diff slab)
sequences.describe: Surface lifts 2px and the refraction breathes once. Real Liquid DOM picks this up via pointer events on the Glass element.
sequences.real_liquid_only: fabric warps under the surface via WebGPU Glass refraction; CSS fallback gets only the lift

sequences.describe: Receipt log fills in step-by-step: brief composed → provider ack'd → takes received → taste indexed → receipt closed. Each step animates in 220ms; total ~1.4s if all green.

Two octaves of fbm noise drift over a static field of song letters. Character index per cell is a function of noise, so chars morph continuously as the field flows. Runs at requestAnimationFrame; pauses when document.hidden or shell offscreen.
perf_notes: bucket fillStyle by 6 alpha tiers to minimise context state changes
respect prefers-reduced-motion: pause flow, freeze at t=0

sequences.describe: Subtle accent underline draws under the section name, 240ms ease-out.

sequences.trigger: user applies a TasteSignal chip in the popover
sequences.describe: Chip stamps onto its anchor and a marker stamps on the target. Ink stamp, not confetti.
Each stat dot lights up in sequence (lyric → mix → taste → provenance), each 220ms with a 140ms stagger.

global_rules: No playful bounces, no decorative motion. Motion only confirms a state change or shows lineage.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: pause fabric flow, replace receipt pipeline with instant-fill, skip release-gate-pass step animation.
Liquid DOM hover effects are only for surfaces tagged data-liquid; CSS fallback for the rest.
